name: swipe-ugc
comment: playwright is pinned EXACTLY (no ^/~): browser binaries are baked into swipe-backend/Dockerfile.bake for this precise version, while the npm package is installed at runtime from this file. A range lets npm resolve a newer playwright that expects browser revisions absent from the image ('Executable doesn't exist at /ms-playwright/...'). Bump both places together.

scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm test && node worker/bake.mjs --check-base && npm run test:preview
